Disclaimer

Important Legal Information - Last Updated: 13 October 2025

General Disclaimer

The information contained in this website is for general information purposes only. The information is provided by KF Legacy Resources ("KFLR", "we", "us" or "our") and while we endeavour to keep the information up to date and correct, we make no representations or warranties of any kind, express or implied, about the completeness, accuracy, reliability, suitability or availability with respect to the website or the information, products, services, or related graphics contained on the website for any purpose.

Any reliance you place on such information is therefore strictly at your own risk. In no event will we be liable for any loss or damage including without limitation, indirect or consequential loss or damage, or any loss or damage whatsoever arising from loss of data or profits arising out of, or in connection with, the use of this website.

Professional Advice Disclaimer

Through this website you are able to access information about information technology solutions, network infrastructure, security systems, and related services. This information is provided for general informational purposes only and should not be considered as professional advice specific to your situation.

The content on this website does not constitute professional IT consulting, legal advice, or financial advice. We recommend that you seek independent professional advice tailored to your specific business requirements, technical environment, and compliance obligations before making any decisions based on information found on this website. Every organization's IT infrastructure and security needs are unique, and solutions that work for one organization may not be suitable for another.

Website Content and Information

The materials and information on this website, including but not limited to:

  • Product specifications and features
  • Service descriptions and capabilities
  • Technical documentation and whitepapers
  • Case studies and project examples
  • Pricing estimates and quotations
  • Blog posts and articles

are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind, either expressed or implied, including but not limited to the implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement. We do not warrant that the functions contained in the materials will be uninterrupted or error-free, that defects will be corrected, or that this website or the server that makes it available are free of viruses or other harmful components.

Third-Party Products and Services

This website may contain information about, or links to, third-party products, services, and technologies including but not limited to Cisco, HP, Aruba, Hikvision, D-Link, TP-Link, Milestone Systems, and other manufacturers and software vendors. KFLR is an authorized reseller and integrator for many of these brands, but we are not the manufacturer or developer of these products.

All product names, logos, brands, trademarks, and registered trademarks are property of their respective owners. All company, product and service names used in this website are for identification purposes only. Use of these names, logos, and brands does not imply endorsement by the respective trademark holders.

While we strive to provide accurate information about third-party products, specifications, features, and compatibility may change without notice. We recommend verifying all technical specifications directly with the manufacturer before making purchase decisions. KFLR is not responsible for changes to third-party products, discontinuation of products, or manufacturer warranty policies.

Technical Accuracy and Changes

The information technology industry evolves rapidly. Product specifications, software versions, compatibility requirements, security vulnerabilities, and best practices change frequently. While we make every effort to keep our website content current and accurate, there may be delays in updating information to reflect the latest changes.

Technical information, configuration examples, command-line syntax, and troubleshooting guides provided on this website are based on our experience and testing at the time of publication. However, different hardware revisions, firmware versions, operating system updates, and network environments may produce different results. We strongly recommend testing all configurations in a non-production environment before deployment and maintaining proper backups before making any system changes.

Service Availability and Performance

While we strive for 99.9% uptime for our managed services and support contracts, we do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free service availability. Factors beyond our control, including but not limited to natural disasters, power outages, internet service provider issues, cyber attacks, hardware failures, and force majeure events may cause service interruptions.

Performance metrics, speed improvements, cost savings, and efficiency gains mentioned on this website are based on typical scenarios and historical data from our client engagements. Actual results will vary depending on your specific environment, existing infrastructure, usage patterns, and numerous other factors. Past performance and results achieved for other clients do not guarantee similar outcomes for your organization.

Security and Data Protection

While we implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data and our systems, no method of transmission over the Internet or method of electronic storage is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security of data transmitted to or stored on our systems or through our services.

Cybersecurity threats evolve constantly, and new vulnerabilities are discovered regularly. Even with firewalls, intrusion prevention systems, antivirus software, and other security controls in place, there is no such thing as perfect security. Organizations must maintain a layered defense-in-depth approach, regular security assessments, employee training, and incident response capabilities.

KFLR provides security solutions and recommendations based on industry best practices and our professional experience. However, the ultimate responsibility for your organization's security posture, compliance with regulations, and protection of sensitive data rests with your organization and designated personnel.

Limitation of Warranties

KFLR makes no warranties or representations about the accuracy or completeness of this website's content or the content of any websites linked to this website. We assume no liability or responsibility for any:

  • Errors or omissions in the content of this website
  • Unauthorized access to or alteration of your transmissions or data
  • Statements or conduct of any third party on the website or through our services
  • Software bugs, viruses, trojan horses, or other harmful code that may be transmitted through our website
  • Delays, interruptions, or service failures
  • Equipment failures or compatibility issues

Product warranties are provided by the respective manufacturers and are subject to their terms and conditions. KFLR will assist in warranty claims and RMA processes but is not responsible for manufacturer warranty decisions, repair turnaround times, or product replacement policies.

Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, in no event shall KFLR, its officers, directors, employees, or agents, be liable to you for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, punitive, or consequential damages whatsoever resulting from:

  • Errors or omissions in content on this website
  • Any unauthorized access to or use of our servers and/or any personal information stored therein
  • Any interruption or cessation of transmission to or from the website
  • Any bugs, viruses, or other harmful code that may be transmitted through the website
  • Any errors or omissions in any content or for any loss or damage incurred as a result of the use of content
  • Business interruption, loss of profits, loss of data, or loss of business opportunity

whether based on warranty, contract, tort, or any other legal theory, and whether or not KFLR is advised of the possibility of such damages. Some jurisdictions do not allow the exclusion or limitation of liability for consequential or incidental damages, so the above limitation may not apply to you.

External Links and Third-Party Websites

This website may contain links to external websites that are not provided or maintained by or in any way affiliated with KFLR. Please note that KFLR does not guarantee the accuracy, relevance, timeliness, or completeness of any information on these external websites. We have no control over the nature, content, and availability of those sites. The inclusion of any links does not necessarily imply a recommendation or endorse the views expressed within them. Your use of external websites is subject to their respective terms of use and privacy policies.

Service Changes and Modifications

KFLR reserves the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any portion of this website or our services at any time without notice. We also reserve the right to change prices, product offerings, specifications, and availability of products and services without prior notice.

While we will make reasonable efforts to notify existing customers of significant changes to contracted services, we are not liable for any modifications, price changes, suspensions, or discontinuance of services. Service level agreements (SLAs) and support commitments apply only to active contracts and are subject to the specific terms outlined in your service agreement.

Compliance and Regulatory Responsibility

While KFLR can assist with implementing security controls and technical measures to support compliance with various regulations (such as PDPA, ISO 27001, PCI-DSS), the ultimate responsibility for regulatory compliance rests with your organization.

We are not legal advisors and cannot provide legal interpretations of regulatory requirements. Organizations subject to specific compliance mandates should engage qualified legal counsel and compliance specialists to ensure all regulatory obligations are met. KFLR's role is limited to implementing technical controls and providing documentation to support your compliance efforts.

Testimonials and Case Studies

Testimonials and case studies presented on this website represent the experiences and opinions of individual clients. They are not necessarily representative of what others may achieve. Results may vary and are not guaranteed. Project timelines, cost savings, performance improvements, and other outcomes described in case studies are specific to those engagements and may not be replicated in different environments or circumstances.

Intellectual Property Rights

Unless otherwise stated, KFLR and/or its licensors own the intellectual property rights for all material on this website. All intellectual property rights are reserved. You may access this from KFLR for your own personal use subjected to restrictions set in these terms and conditions. You must not republish, sell, rent, sub-license, reproduce, duplicate, or redistribute material from this website without our express written consent.

Changes to This Disclaimer

KFLR reserves the right to revise this disclaimer at any time without notice. By using this website you are agreeing to be bound by the then-current version of this disclaimer. We encourage you to periodically review this page for any changes. Your continued use of this website following the posting of changes will constitute your acceptance of those changes.

Governing Law and Jurisdiction

This disclaimer and your use of this website are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Malaysia. Any disputes relating to this disclaimer or the use of this website shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Malaysia. If any provision of this disclaimer is found to be invalid under any applicable law, such provisions shall be deleted without affecting the remaining provisions herein.

Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using this website, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this disclaimer. If you do not agree to abide by the above, please do not use or access this website. We reserve the right to refuse service, terminate accounts, or cancel orders at our sole discretion.
